subcodes.title: Letter to the Hanafi Imam
subcodes.first_line: Verily this is a Book sent down by leave of thy Lord from the presence of One who is Exalted and Wise. Then were its verses expounded by the leave of thy Lord upon a straight path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. ان هذا کتاب قد نزلت باذن ربک من لدن علی حکیم. ثم قد فصلت آیاته باذن ربک على صراط مستقیم
subcodes.subjects: @need for an educator, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action, @justice and wrath of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
